page: Alibaba Cloud ecs.r7.32xlarge is a memory-optimized virtual machine instance powered by the KVM hypervisor. It features an x86_64 architecture with 128 dedicated physical cores and 128 vCPUs, utilizing Intel Xeon 8369B processors running at a base clock speed of 2.7 GHz. The instance is configured with a 1:1 thread-to-core ratio, ensuring dedicated CPU allocation without hyperthreading.

This instance is equipped with 1024.0 GB of system memory, providing 8.0 GB of RAM per core. It does not include local storage, requiring external block storage volumes for data persistence. Network connectivity is supported by a baseline bandwidth of 64 Gbps, facilitating high-throughput data transfers between instances and cloud services. No GPUs are bundled with this hardware profile.

Given the high memory-to-vCPU ratio and dedicated physical cores, the ecs.r7.32xlarge offers a resource-dense profile suitable for enterprise-grade applications. It is designed for memory-intensive workloads such as large-scale in-memory databases, heavy data processing pipelines, enterprise resource planning systems, and large-scale caching layers where high memory capacity and dedicated compute resources are required.
description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.r7.32xlarge is a memory-optimized instance featuring 128 dedicated physical cores and 128 vCPUs powered by Intel Xeon 8369B processors running at 2.7 GHz. Built on the x86_64 architecture and KVM hypervisor, this instance provides 1024.0 GB of RAM, translating to 8.0 GB of memory per core. It does not include local storage, relying entirely on network-attached storage, but offers a robust baseline network bandwidth of 64 Gbps. With its dedicated CPU allocation and high memory density, the ecs.r7.32xlarge is designed for demanding enterprise workloads. It is highly suited for in-memory databases, large-scale data analytics, caching layers, and memory-intensive enterprise applications.
og_description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.r7.32xlarge is a memory-optimized instance featuring 128 dedicated vCPUs, 1024 GB RAM, and a 64 Gbps network baseline, designed for large-scale enterprise databases and data processing.
meta_description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.r7.32xlarge features 128 dedicated vCPUs, 1024 GB RAM, and 64 Gbps network bandwidth for memory-intensive enterprise workloads.
tagline: A high-density memory-optimized instance featuring dedicated physical cores and high-speed networking for demanding enterprise database and analytical workloads.
bullet_points: 128 dedicated physical cores and vCPUs powered by Intel Xeon 8369B processors.
1024.0 GB of system memory providing 8.0 GB of RAM per core.
64 Gbps baseline network bandwidth for high-throughput data transfers.
Zero local storage configuration, requiring external block storage.
Optimized for in-memory databases, caching layers, and enterprise ERP systems.
